executive_summary: CINEOS has identified 3 active sites distributing fake PhonePe APK applications designed to defraud Indian consumers. Each site has been independently verified as live, captures PhonePe branding, and distributes software that generates fraudulent payment screenshots. Evidence is IT Act 65B certified.

findings.evidence: Site impersonates PhonePe brand, distributes fake payment receipt APK
findings.violation: IT Act 66C — identity theft, Trade Marks Act 1999 Section 29

findings.evidence: Site titled "Fake PhonePe APK 26.04.10.0 Download Latest Version 2026" — distributes APK generating fake receipts
findings.violation: IT Act 66C — identity theft + IT Act 66D — cheating by personation
findings.action: Report to Google Safe Browsing + CERT-In

findings.evidence: Instagram page titled "Fake Payment Screenshot Generator" — distributes tools to create fraudulent UPI receipts
findings.action: Meta India abuse report + NPCI alert

what_cineos_can_prove: Each URL is live and accessible as of May 10, 2026 at 16:16 IST
Site content directly references PhonePe brand
Sites distribute or promote fake payment generation
Evidence SHA-256 hashed under IT Act 65B
CINEOS can provide screenshot evidence on request
what_cineos_cannot_prove: Number of downloads from these sites
Identity of site operators (requires WHOIS + police)
Whether any specific transaction was defrauded
requested_actions: File DMCA / brand infringement with site registrars
Report to CERT-In for cyber incident tracking
Alert NPCI — fake UPI receipts threaten merchant trust
cineos_offer: CINEOS monitors for new fake PhonePe sites daily. Enterprise subscription provides real-time alerts within minutes of new impersonation sites appearing. Contact: yugandhar@cineos.in
